session.user:
Run the following command and report results:
pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/land/ -v --tb=short
Report how many passed and if any failed.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command to check the test results for the land command tests.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run land command unit tests with verbose output
